# PHIL.099 ? Objectivism

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** specialized_interdisciplinary
**Subcategory:** objectivism
**Domain:** SPECIALIZED_INTERDISCIPLINARY
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Ayn Rand; rational self-interest; objective reality; reason as only source of knowledge; laissez-faire capitalism; individual rights

## Application
Rational self-interest as virtue; objective reality; reason paramount; productive achievement; individual rights; free markets

## Key Values
- Rational egoism
- Objective reality
- Individual rights
- Capitalism

philosophy, specialized-interdisciplinary, objectivism
